summary: P0 tenant color bug fix and P1 ai_suggestions removal VERIFIED. Backend: 6/6 tests passed. Frontend: Login page loads correctly and login flow works with super admin credentials.

integration_issues.issue: 403 errors on tenant-specific endpoints (expected behavior - super_admin without tenant context)

login_endpoint.notes: Returns access_token, user, tenant fields. Branding data included in tenant object for tenant users.

tenants_endpoint.notes: Returns tenants with branding data (primary_color, secondary_color in snake_case)

frontend_login_page.notes: Login page loads correctly with email/password inputs and Sign In button

frontend_login_flow.notes: Login with gen@quadley.com / Quadley2025! redirects to /dashboard successfully

changes: Line 35: Uses useTenant() hook for branding
Lines 39-42: Runtime branding takes priority over build-time defaults for primaryColor, displayName, tenantCode, tenantLogo
Line 110-123: Fixed clearTenant - now uses SecureStore.deleteItemAsync('tenant') instead of AsyncStorage bug
ai_suggestions import and router registration removed (P1 complete)

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Mobile auth screens now use useTenant() for runtime branding
PASS: TenantContext.clearTenant() fixed to use SecureStore instead of AsyncStorage
PASS: ai_suggestions.py removed and import/router cleaned from server.py
PASS: Login response includes tenant branding for tenant-specific users
PASS: GET /api/tenants returns branding with snake_case colors (primary_color, secondary_color)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 (tenant color bug on mobile) and P1 (ai_suggestions removal) both verified. Mobile files use useTenant() for runtime branding. Backend login returns tenant.branding data. AI suggestions endpoint correctly returns 404. Super admin login works but gets 403 on tenant-specific endpoints (expected since no tenant context).
